heading: Prerequisites
body:
To integrate OneLogin LDAP (Lightweight Directory Access Protocol) with Atlas, you must have:

- An Azure (Microsoft Azure) subscription. To obtain a subscription, visit the
  [Microsoft Azure portal](https://azure.microsoft.com/en-us/free/).

- `Contributor` privileges or greater for your Azure (Microsoft Azure) subscription to
  create the resources the LDAP (Lightweight Directory Access Protocol) integration requires.

- An Microsoft Entra ID tenant associated with
  your subscription. For information about setting up an
  Microsoft Entra ID tenant, see the
  [Microsoft Entra ID Documentation](https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/active-directory/develop/quickstart-create-new-tenant).

- `Global Administrator` privileges in your Microsoft Entra ID tenant to enable
  OneLogin.

- A custom, routable domain name.
